classification.reason: SemiAnalysis is a premium AI infrastructure research outlet. This digest contains 16 paywalled/free articles covering GPU economics, inference performance benchmarks, AI lab unit economics, and hyperscaler strategy — all directly relevant to the AI/LLM Agent wiki.

articles.title: AI Value Capture - The Shift To Model Labs
articles.reason: Core framework: 'One Chart to Rule Them All' for GPU rental economics, VR NVL72 pricing, value accrual across AI stack (labs, neoclouds, hyperscalers, hardware). Directly maps to [[Token Economics]], [[GPU Rental Market]], [[Nvidia Rubin]].

articles.title: The Inference Layer — Three inference infrastructure startups raising $30B combined
articles.reason: Baseten ($11B val), Fireworks AI ($15B val), Modal Labs ($4.5B), Together AI ($1B+ ARR). Covers the inference infrastructure layer between model providers and app developers. Directly maps to [[Inference Infrastructure]], [[Baseten]], [[Fireworks AI]], [[Modal]].

articles.title: The Margin — Anthropic vs OpenAI profitability divergence
articles.reason: Anthropic projecting first profitable frontier AI lab quarter ($559M operating profit Q2 2026), OpenAI filing for $60B IPO at $852B valuation with projected losses. Unit economics divergence analysis. Maps to [[Anthropic]], [[OpenAI]], [[AI Lab Economics]].

articles.title: compute is revenue — Hugh Hendry / ACID Capitalist
articles.reason: Macro/financial thesis: compute becoming revenue, scarcity migrating upstream to physical infrastructure (transformers, cooling, fiber, electricity). Maps to [[AI Infrastructure Economics]].

articles.title: The $575B AI Infrastructure Bet — Tomasz Tunguz / GTM Now
articles.reason: Meta/Google/Oracle leveraging 7-to-1 on cash flow for data center build-outs. $575B AI infrastructure spend. Two-buyer reality (human + AI agent). Maps to [[Hyperscaler CapEx]], [[AI Agent Benchmarking]].

articles.title: Anthropic Growth and Bedrock Mix Drive AWS Margins Higher
articles.reason: Detailed Tokenomics 2.0 analysis: Anthropic ARR $30B, Claude Code driving enterprise adoption, Bedrock $5.5B run rate, Anthropic/Bedrock deal economics. Maps to [[Anthropic]], [[AWS Bedrock]], [[Claude Code]].

articles.title: Cerebras — Faster Tokens Please
articles.reason: Cerebras IPO deep dive: OpenAI $24.6B deal (750MW), WSE-3 vs GPU FLOP comparison, GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark at 2,000 tok/sec/user, fast tokens trend. Maps to [[Cerebras]], [[Wafer-Scale Engine]], [[GPT-5.3]].

articles.title: AI Dark Output: The Visible Cost of Invisible Output
articles.reason: $1.5T in tasks current AI could augment/automate. Dark Output Monitor framework for measuring AI economic impact. Maps to [[AI Economics]], [[Labor Displacement]].

articles.title: InferenceX v2: NVIDIA Blackwell vs AMD vs Hopper
articles.reason: GB300 NVL72 benchmark: up to 100x FP4 throughput vs H100, disaggregated serving, wide EP, MTP. Maps to [[InferenceX]], [[NVIDIA Blackwell]], [[GPU Benchmarking]].

articles.title: Another Giant Leap: The Rubin CPX Specialized Accelerator & Rack
articles.reason: Nvidia Rubin CPX: prefill-specialized chip with 20 PFLOPS FP4, disaggregated prefill/decode architecture. Maps to [[Nvidia Rubin]], [[Disaggregated Serving]].

articles.title: GB300 NVL72 vs GB200 NVL72 Inference Performance
articles.reason: DeepSeek-V4-Pro 1.6T FP4 benchmarks: GB300 2.83x throughput vs GB200 at 27 tok/s/user, HBM headroom analysis, cost-per-token breakdown. Maps to [[InferenceX]], [[DeepSeek-V4]].

articles.title: B200 NVFP4 vs H200 INT4 on Kimi K2.5/K2.6
articles.reason: 2.95x cost-per-token advantage B200 NVFP4 vs H200 INT4, Kimi K2.5/K2.6 (xAI Cursor Composer models), precision analysis. Maps to [[Kimi]], [[NVIDIA Blackwell]].

articles.title: How Oracle Is Winning the AI Compute Market
articles.reason: Oracle's AI cloud strategy: networking cost advantages, OpenAI partnership, Crusoe datacenter deal, 20% CapEx advantage over neoclouds. Maps to [[Oracle Cloud]], [[AI Infrastructure]].

articles.title: Microsoft's AI Strategy Deconstructed
articles.reason: Azure Foundry Token-as-a-Service, AI Token Factory Economics Stack, Microsoft's datacenter pause recovery, Neocloud GPU rental strategy. Maps to [[Azure Foundry]], [[Microsoft AI]].

articles.title: How Much Do GPU Clusters Really Cost?
articles.reason: GPU Cluster TCO Calculator, Goodput Calculator, Gold/Silver tier provider comparison, hidden costs (goodput loss, setup, debugging). Maps to [[GPU TCO]], [[Cluster Economics]].

articles.title: The Great GPU Shortage — H100 1 Year Rental Price Index
articles.reason: H100 rental pricing up 40%, GPU rental market structure (short/mid/long-term), Neocloud dynamics, pricing trends. Maps to [[GPU Rental Market]].

articles.reason: Beehiiv homepage/promotional link — not article content.

articles.reason: Beehiiv email status/infrastructure link — not article content.

key_themes: AI Lab Unit Economics (Anthropic profitability vs OpenAI losses)
Inference Infrastructure Layer (Baseten, Fireworks AI, Modal)
Next-Gen Hardware (Nvidia Rubin, GB300 NVL72, Cerebras WSE-3)
Hyperscaler Strategy (AWS Bedrock, Azure Foundry, Oracle Cloud)
AI Economic Impact ($1.5T Dark Output, $575B infra bet)
recommended_actions: Ingest all critical/high articles into wiki/raw/articles/
Create/update entity pages: Anthropic, Cerebras, Baseten, Fireworks AI, Modal Labs, Oracle Cloud, Azure Foundry
Create/update concept pages: Token Economics, GPU TCO, Inference Infrastructure, Disaggregated Serving, AI Lab Economics
Update existing wiki pages with new benchmark data and financial figures
